MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ALLEN GROSSMAN'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

Appearances: Andrew Shen of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.4780) for respondent and opposing party; Michael Ng of Kerr & Wagstaffe LLP (415.371.8500) for and with petitioner and moving party.

Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)
